message:
Gemini: handle thought parts and map ReasoningEffort to thinkingConfig

Fixes D-20: thought:true parts are now parsed as ContentThinking in both
Complete() and Stream(), checked BEFORE text parts since thought parts
also carry a text field.
Fixes D-21: ReasoningEffort maps to thinkingConfig.thinkingBudget via
reasoningEffortToBudget helper (low=1024, medium=8192, high=32768).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
